description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker with a robust and structured silhouette, featuring a padded collar and a perforated toe box for breathability. The shoe is equipped with a standard criss-cross lacing system, and the laces are thick and prominent, looping through multiple eyelets. The side panels display a swoosh-shaped design element, and the midsole is thick, providing ample cushioning. The outsole appears to have a fine tread pattern for grip, and the overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic leather and rubber materials. The shoe is predominantly white with some dark accent details on the laces and side.
description: A high-top, white athletic sneaker with a padded collar, perforated toe box, and criss-cross lacing. Features a swoosh design on the side and a thick, cushioned sole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the perforated toe box, thick laces, and padded tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the swoosh design, high collar, and midsole details.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the opening, collar padding, and lace arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible swoosh and lacing.
